titleStmt.title: SII 28.195: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 195. (A.R. No. 350 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, south gōpuram, right of entrance.

p.hi: Māṟavarmaṉ Vīrakēraḷa alias Kulaśēkharadēva Year 4, 67th day.

summary.p: Records an order issued by Cheydiyarāyaṉ approving the grant of total of 2 vēli, 17 mā, (1/2) kāṇi and odd of land purchased in several plots, by Chēndaṉ Perumāṉ alias Maḻavarāyar of Paḷḷikōḍu in Malai-maṇḍalam, authoristing irrigation facilities i.e. drawing of water, by channelising by the percolation process and baling process as necessary and exempting the land from all levies including kaḍamai and kuḍimai as assessed. Out of the total land as mentioned above 1550 kuḻi was set apart for raising two flower gardans, one in Kuṇḍōdarapāḍi alias Tiruchiṟṟambalamaṅgalam and the other in Irāma-dēva-maṅgalam and the rest of the land was earmarked to be used as tirunanda-vaṉappuṟam to provide wages (koṟṟu) and clothes (puḍavai) to four sevants (toṇḍargaḷ) who undertook (mudalkoṇḍa) to raise the flower-gardens and supply flowers to the tiruppū-maṇḍapam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti § śrīmeṟkittikkumel komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccak
karavatti virakeraḷaṉāṉa śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu
nāḷ Aṟupattu Eḻiṉāl ceytiyarāyaṉ Olai Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampala
muṭaiyār koyil kaṇkāṇi karaṇattārum tirukkaioṭṭi paṇṭāra
ttārum kaṇṭu malaimaṇṭalattu paḷḷikoṭṭuccentaṉ peru
māṉāṉa maḻavarāyar ceyvitta kuṇṭotarapāṭiyāṉa tirucciṟṟam
palamaṅkalattum Irāmatevamaṅkalattu maḻavarāyaṉ tirunantavaṉamā
kūpavakkuṟi varatarācapaṭṭaṉum tavetakomapuṟattuRead tivetikomapurattuc ceṉyai paṭṭa
ṉum pakkal vilaikoṇṭa nilattukku Ellai kurukulattaraiyar cey
vitta tevarkaḷ tevaṉ tirunantavaṉattukkum kaṟpakanāyaṉār tirunantava
ṉattukkum cammāta vāykkālukku kiḻakkum teṟkum capāppo
tu nilattukku meṟkkum śrīpiṭattu cellappiḷḷaiyār tiruṉantava
ṉattukku vaṭakkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ mikutikkuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭa
ṅka kuḻi Āyirattu Añūṟṟu Aimpatu Ikkuḻi Āyirattu Añūṟṟu
Aimpatu tiruṉantavaṉam ceytu tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku mutalāka tiruppāḷ
ḷittāmam Aḷakkavum tirumaṭaippaḷḷip paṇṭārattukkum mutalākavum
Ippaṭi cevikkavum mutal koṇṭa tiruttoṇṭarkaḷ per nālva
rkku koṟṟukkum puṭavai mutalukkum nantavaṉappuṟamākak koṇṭu vi
ṭṭa Irācātirāca vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇaiyūr nāṭṭu kuṇṭotarappāṭi
yāṉa kūttāṭunāyakaccaruppetimaṅkalattu kirāñci tuṟo ṇa
paṭṭaṉc comaiyāciyār pakkal vilaikoṇṭa koḷḷiṭa
vāṟṟukku teṟku cantiracekaravatikku meṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu
mutaṟcatirattu Ettaccey Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilattu kuḻi Aṟunūṟṟu nā
ṟpattāṟiṉāl nilam Āṟumākkāṇi Araikkāṇicciṉṉamum Ivvāṟ
ṟukku meṟku tirucciṟṟampala vāykkālukku vaṭakku Iḻakkaṉntiṟattu te
varkaḷ tevar Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku vaṭakkum kiḻakkum Āḷavantā
ṉ Oṭaikkut teṟkum śrīpiṭattu cellappiḷḷaiyār tiruppaṇṇi
kārappuṟattukku meṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa
maṇañci Eṉṟu peruṭai nilattukkuḻi Irunūṟṟu Irupattu Aiñci
ṉāl rūpāym Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyum pavakkuṟi varatarāca paṭṭaṉum kuro
vi cirāmapaṭṭaṉum pakkal koṇṭa koḷḷiṭa vāṟṟukku vaṭakku pa
ṭṭa tavarācarācaṉ tirunantavaṉappuṟattukkum Uṭaiyār Irācākkaḷ
nāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇip paruvarampukku meṟkum paḷḷi cey Eṉ
ṟu peruṭaiya nilattukku vaṭakku Uṭciṟu vāykkālukkuk kiḻakku
m tirunāmattukkāṇi Irācarācaṉ tirunantavaṉappuṟattukkut teṟkum
Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa kuḻi nānūṟṟiṉāl nilam nālumā
vum kārampicceṭṭu kantakumāra paṭṭaṉ pirāmaṇi Aṟamuṭaiyāḷ cāṉi
pakkal koṇṭa vaṭakarai Āḷavantāṉ Oṭaikku vaṭakkum palati�
paṭṭāl meṭum paḷḷamum karumāṇikka Āḻvāṉ kuṇame ṉa
peruṭaiya nilattukku Ellai Iḻakkaṉtiṟattu tevarkaḷ tevapaṭṭaṉ
nilattukku kiḻakkum tirunaṭṭamaṅkalattu Ellaikkut teṟkum ko
mapurattu śikṛṣṇapaṭṭaṉ nilattukku meṟkkum naṭuvuḷpaṭṭa kuḻi Ā
yirattu muṉṉūṟṟiṉāl nilam Araiye muṉṟu māvum komapuṟattu �
varkaḷ tevapaṭṭaṉum varatarācapaṭṭaṉum pakkal koṇṭa teṉ
karai Aḻukuveli Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilattukku Ellai tiruna
Uṭaiyār maṭapuṟattukku meṟku ṉṟāṉ maṇa ṉ pāḻikku vaṭa
kkum kūttā ra muṭaiyār tirunāmattukkāṇi nilattukkum vā
ykkālukku kiḻakkum paṇṭitar kā ṇiyāṉa maṇakkuṉṟu pāḻukku
t teṟkum naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa kuḻi Aṟunūṟṟiṉāl nilam Āṟu māvum Iv
vūril Irukkum tiruttoṇṭarkaḷil Iḷamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvampa
la perumāḷum koliyakkuṭaiyāṉ civatavaṉapperumāḷum pakkal
koṇṭa Āṟṟukku vaṭakku cantiracekaravatikku kiḻakku Āḷavantāṉ O
ṭaikkut teṟku śrīpiṭattuc cellappiḷḷaiyār tiruppaṇṇikārap pu
ṟattukku meṟku toṭṭikāl nilattukku vaṭakku tirunilaiaḻakiya viḷā
kam Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilattuk kuḻi Añūṟṟiṉāl nilam kālum Iṉama
ṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ puvaṉaettāṭuvāṉum koliyakkuṭaiyāṉ tiruc
ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉum pakkal koṇṭa Āṟṟukku vaṭakku co
ṭicey Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilattukku Ellai ceṭṭiyār putuvuṭai
yār Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku meṟkum Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ
tirunantavaṉattukku vaṭakkum tiruviṉāyakaṉ tirunantavaṉappuṟattukku kiḻakku
Āḷavantāṉoṭaikkut teṟkum Irukiṭaippāṭṭāl kuḻi Añūṟṟiṉāl
nilam kālum Āka tirunantavaṉam Uṭpaṭa nilam Iraṇṭe mukkāle Ira
ṇṭu māvaraik kāṇic ciṉṉamum Iṉṉilattukkuppāya nir pāyavum vā
rum nir vāravum Iṟaikkum nir Iṟaikkavum Uḷḷiṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Urittāva
tākavum Iṉṉilaṅkaḷukku vanta kaṭamai kuṭimai Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittu va
ṟkamum taviravum Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ cella kal veṭṭi
kaṭavatākavum paṇṇuvate § Iṉṉilam Iraṇṭe mukkāle
Iraṇṭu mā Araik kāṇic ciṉṉattukkum Ivai cetiyarāyaṉeḻuttuIt stops here.
Digital edition of SII 28.195 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
